name: Artichoke Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic and salt together with a fork.
2. Add the fresh artichoke hearts and mash everything together.
3. Stir in the olive oil, lemon juice, wine vinegar, hot sauce, and Worcestershire sauce until well combined.
4. Toss the canned artichoke hearts in the dressing.
5. Let marinate for 1 hour, then serve as is or on a bed of greens.
